title: stelis ramonensis
intro: Stelis ramonensis, also known as the Ramon orchid or Ramon's stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico. This epiphytic orchid is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine. It is believed to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing and the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, where it is steeped in hot water to release its active compounds and provide relief from various ailments.
